primary.description: LM Studio local server using the loaded Qwen3 Embedding 4B identifier

lm_studio.description: LM Studio embedding server using an OpenAI-compatible API

lm_studio_qwen3.description: LM Studio CLI-loaded Qwen3 Embedding 4B model identifier

primary.description: BGE-reranker-v2-m3 via llama-server --reranking en localhost:8080/v1/rerank. Arrancar: start_qwen_reranker_server.bat

setup: 1. Edit this file to configure your preferred embedding providers
2. Set 'primary' to your main embedding service
4. Run start_qwen_embedding_server.ps1 or .bat to start either llama.cpp or LM Studio
5. For Ollama: pull nomic-embed-text if you want a fallback provider
6. For LM Studio: the loaded model identifier is qwen3-embed-4b
7. Para reranking: cargar con 'lms load text-embedding-bge-reranker-v2-m3 -y' — endpoint: http://localhost:1234/v1/rerank
8. For OpenAI: add your API key
9. Restart the memory system to apply changes

providers.llama_cpp: Recommended local setup for Qwen3 GGUF embedding models
providers.lm_studio: OpenAI-compatible local server if LM Studio recognizes your embedding model
providers.openai: High quality but requires internet and API costs
providers.custom: Any HTTP reranking or embedding server with a compatible JSON contract
